workflows.name: Full Pipeline Run

steps.narrative: First script to run. Walks the directory tree collecting file counts, extensions, size tiers, and a README excerpt. Outputs ~800 token JSON.
Reads config files to identify the primary language, framework, runtime, and package manager.
Combines all four script outputs into repo-analysis.json under 3500 tokens. Trims lowest-complexity modules if over budget.
Reads repo-analysis.json and all site-content/*.json files, builds search index and sidebar nav, then writes the final self-contained index.html.

workflows.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  User->>SKILL.md: explain this repo
  SKILL.md->>scan_repo.py: python scan_repo.py <path>
  scan_repo.py-->>SKILL.md: scan.json
  SKILL.md->>merge_analysis.py: merge all outputs
  merge_analysis.py-->>SKILL.md: repo-analysis.json
  SKILL.md->>Haiku: dispatch file-reader agents
  Haiku-->>SKILL.md: file briefings
  SKILL.md->>Sonnet: generate section content
  Sonnet-->>SKILL.md: site-content JSON
  SKILL.md->>generate_site.py: assemble site
  generate_site.py-->>User: index.html
